title: US Inflation Seen Spiking in First Snapshot Since Iran War
summary: The sudden increase in US gasoline prices felt by American consumers is set to be on full display in key inflation data due out this coming week.

title: Sleijpen Says ECB Discussion Will Be Rate Hike or Hold: Podcast
summary: The European Central Bank’s next discussion will between increasing interest rates or holding them steady, according to Governing Council member Olaf Sleijpen.

title: Pakistan Says It Will Repay Matured Loan Deposits to UAE
summary: Pakistan will return matured loan deposits to the United Arab Emirates, in a move that will strain the South Asian nation’s reserves.
